title: calcitrapa carneola
intro: Calcitrapa carneola, also known as the red bird's eye pepper or bird's eye chili, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. Traditionally, the plant's seeds and leaves have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calcitrapa carneola include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to help manage respiratory issues and fever. The plant's seeds and leaves are often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
